content.text: The ratified sketch fixes max_open_prs_per_repo_per_ticket=1; the context nudges 2, which is a DRIFT from the ratified design. I will not hand-apply it — surfacing the discrepancy so a re-ratify decision is explicit.

questions.question: The ratified sketch fixes max_open_prs_per_repo_per_ticket=1, but the context nudges set 2 — that differs from the ratified design (a drift). Re-ratify a new generation at 2, or keep the byte-identical 1?

options.label: Keep 1 (leave the byte-identical write to the loop)
